examples: As ciliary muscle contracts, it pulls on these tissues.
There are two circumoral ciliary rows on the buccal region and a dorsal row of bristles.
The ciliary body is an anterior dilation of the choroid at the level of the lens.
In 1990 they cloned a breakthrough product: ciliary neurotrophic factor, or CNTF, a nerve growth hormone they later named Axokine.
